test_cases.test_case: Very long text in Hotels 'Destination' field

test_cases.test_case: Special characters and emoji in Flights 'Departure_City' and 'Arrival_City' fields

test_cases.test_case: Rapid back-navigation after Hotels search — preserve or clearly reset search state (no duplicate actions)
preconditions: User is on the Home Page
Hotels tab is visible in the Search widget
steps: 1. Click the Hotels tab in the Search widget
2. Enter <valid Destination> in the Destination field
3. Enter <valid Check_in_Date> in the Check_in_Date field
4. Enter <valid Check_out_Date after or equal to Check_in_Date> in the Check_out_Date field
5. Enter <minimum valid value> in the Adults field
6. Click the Search button
7. Wait for redirect to the Hotels results listing page
8. Use the browser Back button once to return to the Home Page Search widget
9. Immediately (within a short interval) click the Search button again
test_cases.expected_result: After the first successful search and redirect (Search succeeds), pressing Back returns the user to the Hotels search form. Immediately clicking Search again succeeds (redirects) or the UI prevents accidental duplicate network actions by debouncing the click and still results in a single search request; no duplicated result pages or duplicate-created entities are shown. The user sees either the search re-run (redirect to results) or a single visible network action with no duplicate side-effects.

test_cases.test_case: Travel Start and End on the same day (boundary pass)

steps: 1. Enter <date X> in Travel_Start_Date
2. Enter the same <date X> in Travel_End_Date
3. Click the Search button
test_cases.expected_result: Search submits successfully; user is redirected to Tours_Listing_Page and the listing is displayed. The search criteria shown on the listing page indicates Travel Start and Travel End as the same date.

test_cases.test_case: Travel Start is after Travel End by one day (just-past boundary — blocked)
preconditions: User is on the Tours Search form
steps: 1. Enter <date X + 1 day> in Travel_Start_Date
2. Enter <date X> in Travel_End_Date
3. Click the Search button
test_cases.expected_result: Search is blocked / error shown; an inline validation error is displayed next to the Travel_Start_Date and/or Travel_End_Date indicating the start date must be on or before the end date.

test_cases.test_case: Budget_Min equals Budget_Max (exact-equality boundary)
preconditions: User is on the Tours Search form
steps: 1. Enter <amount A> in Budget_Min
2. Enter the same <amount A> in Budget_Max
3. Click the Search button
test_cases.expected_result: Search submits successfully; user is redirected to Tours_Listing_Page and results are shown. The visible results reflect the exact budget boundary (filters applied for Starting_Price_Per_Person equal to <amount A>).

test_cases.test_case: Budget_Min set one unit greater than Budget_Max (just-past boundary — blocked)
preconditions: User is on the Tours Search form
steps: 1. Enter <amount B> in Budget_Max
2. Enter <one unit above amount B> in Budget_Min
3. Click the Search button
test_cases.expected_result: Search is blocked / error shown; an inline validation error is displayed next to the Budget_Min/Budget_Max fields indicating the minimum budget cannot exceed the maximum budget.

test_cases.test_case: Very long Destination string (200+ characters) submitted
preconditions: User is on the Tours Search form
steps: 1. Enter a very long string (200+ characters) in Destination
2. Click the Search button
test_cases.expected_result: Search submits successfully; user is redirected to Tours_Listing_Page. The search criteria summary displays the Destination value — either the full long string is shown or the UI truncates it with a visible ellipsis/indication. No validation error is shown.

test_cases.test_case: Destination containing special characters and emoji
preconditions: User is on the Tours Search form
steps: 1. Enter a Destination value containing special characters and emoji (e.g., symbols, non-Latin characters, emoji) in Destination
2. Click the Search button
test_cases.expected_result: Search submits successfully; user is redirected to Tours_Listing_Page and the search summary displays the entered characters/emoji. No encoding error or validation error is shown.

test_cases.test_case: Rapid resubmit after redirect using browser Back then Search
preconditions: User is on the Tours Search form
steps: 1. Enter <valid Destination> in Destination
2. Enter <valid date> in Travel_Start_Date
3. Click the Search button
4. On Tours_Listing_Page click the browser Back button to return to the Tours Search form
5. Immediately click the Search button again without changing any fields
test_cases.expected_result: Second Search submission succeeds; user is redirected to Tours_Listing_Page. The application returns results for the submitted criteria and does not produce duplicate listings or UI errors (no duplicate creation actions or error dialogs are shown).

test_cases.test_case: Authenticated user selects departure and travelers then clicks Book Now to open Booking Form
steps: 1. Select <Departure Date> from the Departure Date dropdown on the Tour Details page
2. Enter <Adults> in the Adults field
3. Enter <Children> in the Children field
4. Click the 'Book Now' button
test_cases.expected_result: Booking Form is displayed (opens Booking Form)

test_cases.test_case: Unauthenticated user clicks Book Now and is redirected to login
steps: 1. Select <Departure Date> from the Departure Date dropdown on the Tour Details page
2. Enter <Adults> in the Adults field
3. Enter <Children> in the Children field
4. Click the 'Book Now' button
test_cases.expected_result: redirects to login page

test_cases.test_case: Authenticated user completes Booking Form with traveler rows equal to Adults+Children and submits booking
steps: 1. Select <Departure Date> from the Departure Date dropdown on the Tour Details page
2. Enter <Adults> in the Adults field
3. Enter <Children> in the Children field
4. Click the 'Book Now' button to open the Booking Form
5. Click 'Add Traveler' until the number of Travelers rows equals the combined count of <Adults> and <Children>
6. Enter <Name> in each Traveler row
7. Enter <valid email> in the Email field under Contact Details
8. Enter <valid phone> in the Phone field under Contact Details
9. Enter <Special Requirements> in the Special Requirements field (optional)
10. Observe the Total cost breakdown on the Booking Form updates to reflect the calculated total based on <Adults> and <Children>
11. Click the 'Submit Booking' button
test_cases.expected_result: Booking submission completes and a booking confirmation is visible; the Travelers list shows exactly the combined count of <Adults> and <Children> and the Total cost breakdown displays the calculated total based on <Adults> and <Children> (submits booking)

test_cases.test_case: Unauthenticated user attempts to submit Booking Form and is redirected to login
steps: 1. Navigate directly to the Booking Form page (deep link to Booking Form)
2. Click 'Add Traveler' and enter <Name> in at least one Traveler row
3. Enter <valid email> in the Email field under Contact Details
4. Enter <valid phone> in the Phone field under Contact Details
5. Click the 'Submit Booking' button
test_cases.expected_result: redirects to login page

test_cases.test_case: Tour Details total cost breakdown updates when departure date and traveler counts are changed
steps: 1. Select <Departure Date> from the Departure Date dropdown on the Tour Details page
2. Enter <Adults> in the Adults field
3. Enter <Children> in the Children field
4. Observe the Total cost breakdown on the Tour Details page
test_cases.expected_result: Total cost breakdown on the Tour Details page updates to display the calculated total based on <Adults> and <Children>

test_cases.test_case: Click Book Now while unauthenticated redirects to login
steps: 1. Navigate to the Tour Details page
2. Click the 'Book Now' button
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the login page; Booking Form is not opened and no booking flow starts. A redirect to the login page is visible.

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to submit booking while unauthenticated redirects to login
steps: 1. Navigate directly to the Booking Form URL (or open the Booking Form UI)
2. Click the 'Submit Booking' button
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the login page; booking is not submitted. The Booking Form is not accepted and no confirmation or booking record is created.

test_cases.test_case: Submit booking with Travelers count not equal to Adults + Children is blocked
steps: 1. Log in
2. On the Tour Details form enter <Adults count A> in the Adults field
3. On the Tour Details form enter <Children count B> in the Children field
4. Click 'Book Now' to open the Booking Form
5. In the Booking Form add <N> traveler items where <N> is not equal to <Adults count A> + <Children count B>
6. Click 'Submit Booking'
test_cases.expected_result: Form submission is blocked; the Travelers repeating group displays an inline validation error: 'Number of travelers must equal Adults + Children'. Booking is not created and the user remains on the Booking Form.

test_cases.test_case: Submit booking with invalid email format is rejected
steps: 1. Enter <invalid email format> into the Email field in Contact Details
2. Click 'Submit Booking'
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Email field: 'Must be a valid email address'. The form does not submit and no booking is created.

test_cases.test_case: Non-numeric input in Adults or Children prevents booking flow
steps: 1. On the Tour Details form enter <non-numeric input> into the Adults field
2. Click the 'Book Now' button
test_cases.expected_result: Adults field displays an inline validation error: 'Must be a number' (or equivalent numeric-format error). The Booking Form is not opened; the booking flow is blocked until a numeric value is entered.

test_cases.test_case: Submit succeeds when Travelers count exactly equals Adults + Children
steps: 1. Click Book Now
2. In Booking Form, enter a number in Adults (call this <Adults>)
3. In Booking Form, enter a number in Children (call this <Children>)
4. Add exactly <Adults + Children> entries to the Travelers repeating group (one Add action per traveler)
5. Fill required contact details if shown
6. Click Submit Booking
test_cases.expected_result: Submit Booking succeeds; booking confirmation page is shown and the Travelers list in the booking shows exactly <Adults + Children> traveler entries

test_cases.test_case: Submit is blocked when Travelers count is one fewer than Adults + Children
steps: 1. Click Book Now
2. In Booking Form, enter a number in Adults (call this <Adults>)
3. In Booking Form, enter a number in Children (call this <Children>)
4. Add exactly <Adults + Children - 1> entries to the Travelers repeating group
5. Fill required contact details if shown
6. Click Submit Booking
test_cases.expected_result: Submit Booking is blocked; an inline error is shown on the Travelers repeating group indicating the traveler count does not match Adults + Children

test_cases.test_case: Submit is blocked when Travelers count is one more than Adults + Children
steps: 1. Click Book Now
2. In Booking Form, enter a number in Adults (call this <Adults>)
3. In Booking Form, enter a number in Children (call this <Children>)
4. Add exactly <Adults + Children + 1> entries to the Travelers repeating group
5. Fill required contact details if shown
6. Click Submit Booking
test_cases.expected_result: Submit Booking is blocked; an inline error is shown on the Travelers repeating group indicating the traveler count exceeds Adults + Children

test_cases.test_case: Zero-travelers boundary: Submit succeeds when Adults=0 and Children=0 and Travelers count is 0
steps: 1. Click Book Now
2. In Booking Form, set Adults to 0
3. In Booking Form, set Children to 0
4. Ensure there are 0 entries in the Travelers repeating group
5. Fill required contact details if shown
6. Click Submit Booking
test_cases.expected_result: Submit Booking succeeds; booking confirmation page is shown and the Travelers list contains 0 entries

test_cases.test_case: Removing all traveler entries while Adults + Children > 0 blocks submission
steps: 1. Click Book Now
2. In Booking Form, enter a number in Adults (call this <Adults>) such that <Adults> > 0
3. In Booking Form, enter a number in Children (call this <Children>)
4. Add entries to the Travelers repeating group so there are initially <Adults + Children> entries
5. Remove all entries from the Travelers repeating group (use remove action repeatedly until 0 remain)
6. Click Submit Booking
test_cases.expected_result: Submit Booking is blocked; an inline error is shown on the Travelers repeating group indicating the traveler count does not match Adults + Children

test_cases.test_case: Special_Requirements handles very long free-text input
steps: 1. Click into the Special_Requirements field
2. Enter a long free-text string of 200+ characters (including punctuation and emoji)
3. Fill required booking fields so the form can be submitted (ensure Travelers count equals Adults + Children)
4. Click Submit Booking
test_cases.expected_result: Submit Booking succeeds; booking confirmation page displays the Special_Requirements text entered (the full entered text is visible in the confirmation; if the system truncates the field a visible truncation indicator or '...' is shown)

test_cases.test_case: Prevent duplicate booking on browser Back + resubmit after successful booking
steps: 1. Complete Booking Form with valid data and ensure Travelers count equals Adults + Children
2. Click Submit Booking
3. On booking confirmation page, click the browser Back button
4. Attempt to click Submit Booking again from the form or confirmation page
test_cases.expected_result: Second submission is blocked / prevented; no duplicate booking is created and the UI indicates the booking was already processed (user remains on confirmation page or an inline message prevents resubmission)

test_cases.test_case: Submit valid car search redirects to listing page
steps: 1. Enter <pick-up location> in the Pick-up Location field
2. Enter <drop-off location> in the Drop-off Location field
3. Select <pick-up date> in the Pick-up Date field
4. Select <drop-off date> in the Drop-off Date field
5. Select <pick-up time> in the Pick-up Time field
6. Select <drop-off time> in the Drop-off Time field
7. Enter <driver age> in the Driver Age field
8. Click the Search / Submit button on the Car Search form
test_cases.expected_result: redirects to listing page

test_cases.test_case: Search shows grouped vehicle listings with required attributes
steps: 1. Enter valid search criteria in the Car Search form and submit (repeat steps from P-001)
2. Wait for the Listing page to load
test_cases.expected_result: Listing page displays grouped vehicle lists with groups: Economy, Compact, SUV, Luxury, Van. Each listing displays make and model, transmission type, fuel policy, seating and luggage capacity, feature icons (e.g., AC, GPS), price per day and total rental cost for the selected period.

test_cases.test_case: Applying single Car Type filter updates results dynamically
steps: 1. Enter valid search criteria in the Car Search form and submit (repeat steps from P-001)
2. On the Listing page, select <Car_Type> from the Car Type filter in the Sidebar Filters
test_cases.expected_result: Vehicle listings display only vehicles matching selected Car Type '<Car_Type>'; listings from other categories are no longer visible

test_cases.test_case: Applying multiple sidebar filters (Car Type, Transmission, Price Range) narrows results
steps: 1. Enter valid search criteria in the Car Search form and submit (repeat steps from P-001)
2. On the Listing page, select <Car_Type> from Car Type filter
3. Select <Transmission> from Transmission filter
4. Adjust the Price Range control to <price range>
test_cases.expected_result: Vehicle listings display only vehicles matching selected Car Type '<Car_Type>' and Transmission '<Transmission>' and with total price within selected <price range>; unrelated listings are no longer visible

test_cases.test_case: Click Book Now on a listing initiates booking for that vehicle
steps: 1. Enter valid search criteria in the Car Search form and submit (repeat steps from P-001)
2. On the Listing page, identify a vehicle listing and click the Book Now button for the chosen vehicle
test_cases.expected_result: initiates booking for selected vehicle

test_cases.test_case: Submit search with invalid Pick-up Date format
preconditions: User is on the Car Search form page
steps: 1. Enter <invalid date format> into the Pick-up_Date field
2. Fill or leave other fields as needed
3. Click the search/submit button on the Car Search form
test_cases.expected_result: Pick-up Date field displays an inline validation error indicating an invalid date format; the form does not submit and the user is not redirected to the listing page

test_cases.test_case: Submit search with invalid Pick-up Time format
preconditions: User is on the Car Search form page
steps: 1. Enter <invalid time format> into the Pick-up_Time field
2. Fill or leave other fields as needed
3. Click the search/submit button on the Car Search form
test_cases.expected_result: Pick-up Time field displays an inline validation error indicating an invalid time format; the form does not submit and the user is not redirected to the listing page

test_cases.test_case: Submit search with non-numeric Driver Age
preconditions: User is on the Car Search form page
steps: 1. Enter <non-numeric value> into the Driver_Age field
2. Fill or leave other fields as needed
3. Click the search/submit button on the Car Search form
test_cases.expected_result: Driver Age field displays an inline validation error indicating a numeric value is required; the form does not submit and the user is not redirected to the listing page

test_cases.test_case: Submit search where Drop-off Date/Time is before Pick-up Date/Time
preconditions: User is on the Car Search form page
steps: 1. Enter <pick-up date> into the Pick-up_Date field
2. Enter <earlier drop-off date> into the Drop-off_Date field (or same date with Drop-off_Time earlier than Pick-up_Time)
3. Enter times if necessary to create a drop-off datetime earlier than the pick-up datetime
4. Click the search/submit button on the Car Search form
test_cases.expected_result: Drop-off Date/Time fields display an inline validation error indicating the drop-off must be after the pick-up (date/time); the form does not submit and the user is not redirected to the listing page

test_cases.test_case: Set Price Range with minimum greater than maximum in Sidebar Filters
preconditions: User has a search result set visible (listing page or after a search) so sidebar filters are available
steps: 1. In the Sidebar_Filters, set the Price_Range minimum to <value A>
2. Set the Price_Range maximum to <value B> where <value A> is greater than <value B>
3. Observe the filter behavior (do not perform any other interactions)
test_cases.expected_result: Price Range control shows an inline validation error indicating the minimum cannot be greater than the maximum; filters are not applied and the displayed results remain unchanged

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to initiate 'Book Now' from the listing page without first performing a search
preconditions: User navigates directly to the Listing page URL without having submitted the Car Search form
steps: 1. Open the Listing page URL directly in the browser without performing a search
2. Attempt to click the Book Now button on any vehicle listing
test_cases.expected_result: Access is blocked: the application redirects the user to the Car Search form or prevents the Book Now action from initiating a booking (Book Now is not actionable); no booking flow is started

test_cases.test_case: Enter non-numeric characters into Price Range controls
preconditions: User has search results visible and the Sidebar Filters are interactive
steps: 1. Enter <non-numeric value> into the Price_Range minimum input
2. Observe the filter behavior (do not change other filters)
test_cases.expected_result: Price Range minimum input displays an inline validation error indicating a numeric value is required; the invalid filter is not applied and results remain unchanged

test_cases.test_case: Pick-up and Drop-off on the same date (same-day rental) succeeds
steps: 1. Enter a value in Pick-up_Date
2. Enter the same value in Drop-off_Date (Pick-up_Date = Drop-off_Date)
3. Enter a Pick-up_Time that is earlier than the Drop-off_Time
4. Enter any Driver_Age value (optional)
5. Click the search/submit button
test_cases.expected_result: Form submission succeeds; the app redirects to the listing page (redirect occurs) and vehicle listings are displayed. Each listing shows a total rental cost that reflects the selected same-day period (visible in the listing UI).

test_cases.test_case: Drop-off date earlier than Pick-up date is blocked
steps: 1. Enter a value in Pick-up_Date
2. Enter a value in Drop-off_Date that is one day before the Pick-up_Date (Drop-off_Date = Pick-up_Date - 1 day)
3. Enter any Pick-up_Time and Drop-off_Time
4. Click the search/submit button
test_cases.expected_result: Drop-off_Date field displays an inline error indicating the drop-off must be on or after the pick-up date; form submission is blocked and the listing page is not reached (is blocked / error shown).

test_cases.test_case: Price range where min equals max (exact-price filter) succeeds and returns matching results
preconditions: Listing page is open with search results (a previous search was performed)
steps: 1. Focus the Price_Range control
2. Set the Price_Range minimum to a chosen value
3. Set the Price_Range maximum to the same chosen value (min = max)
4. Observe the results area update
test_cases.expected_result: Applying a Price_Range where min equals max succeeds; results update dynamically to show only vehicles whose total price for the selected period equals that value and no inline error is shown (succeeds).

test_cases.test_case: Price range with min greater than max is blocked
preconditions: Listing page is open with search results
steps: 1. Focus the Price_Range control
2. Set the Price_Range minimum to a value
3. Set the Price_Range maximum to a lesser value (min > max)
4. Observe the Price_Range control and results area
test_cases.expected_result: Setting Price_Range with min greater than max is blocked; the Price_Range control shows an inline validation error and results do not update (is blocked / error shown).

test_cases.test_case: Leading and trailing whitespace in Pick-up Location is trimmed on submit
steps: 1. Enter a Pick-up_Location value that includes leading and trailing whitespace
2. Fill any other optional fields as needed
3. Click the search/submit button
test_cases.expected_result: Form submission succeeds; after redirect to the listing page the search summary or listing header displays the Pick-up_Location value with leading and trailing whitespace removed (succeeds).

test_cases.test_case: Special characters and emoji in Drop-off Location are accepted
steps: 1. Enter a Drop-off_Location value containing special characters and emoji
2. Fill any other optional fields as needed
3. Click the search/submit button
test_cases.expected_result: Form submission succeeds; the listing page displays the Drop-off_Location in the search summary including the special characters/emoji and no validation error is shown (succeeds).

test_cases.test_case: Rapid consecutive changes to sidebar filters reflect only the last-applied filter and do not freeze the UI
preconditions: Listing page is open with search results
steps: 1. Click Transmission filter = Automatic
2. Immediately click Transmission filter = Manual
3. Immediately toggle a different sidebar filter (e.g., Car_Type to SUV)
4. Observe the results area after the rapid changes
test_cases.expected_result: Rapid consecutive filter changes succeed; the results area updates dynamically to reflect the last-applied filter set and the UI does not freeze or show an error banner (succeeds).

test_cases.test_case: Complete booking form, accept terms, and confirm booking proceeds to payment
preconditions: A vehicle and rental period have been selected
steps: 1. Open the Car Booking page for the selected vehicle and rental period
2. Enter <driver full name> in the Driver Full Name field
3. Enter <driver age> in the Driver Age field
4. Enter <license number> in the License Number field
5. Select <license issue country> from the License Issue Country dropdown
6. Enter <valid email> in the Email field
7. Enter <phone number> in the Phone Number field
8. Select <insurance plan> from the Insurance Plan dropdown
9. Check the Accept Terms checkbox
10. Click the Confirm Booking button
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the Payment page (proceeds to payment)

test_cases.test_case: Review Terms link opens terms covering fuel policy, mileage limits, damage liability, and cancellation
preconditions: A vehicle and rental period have been selected
steps: 1. Open the Car Booking page for the selected vehicle and rental period
2. Click the Review Terms link
test_cases.expected_result: A terms view/dialog is displayed showing the fuel policy, mileage limits, damage liability, and cancellation information

test_cases.test_case: Selecting insurance plan and optional add-ons updates pricing breakdown and total
preconditions: A vehicle and rental period have been selected
steps: 1. Open the Car Booking page for the selected vehicle and rental period
2. Select <insurance plan> from the Insurance Plan dropdown
3. Check the GPS checkbox
4. Check the Child Seat checkbox
5. Check the Additional Driver checkbox
6. Observe the Pricing breakdown section
test_cases.expected_result: Pricing breakdown updates to show a line item for the selected insurance plan and separate line items for GPS, Child Seat, and Additional Driver; the Total in the pricing breakdown visibly updates to reflect the selected insurance and add-ons

test_cases.test_case: Confirm Booking button remains disabled until Accept Terms is checked then becomes enabled
preconditions: A vehicle and rental period have been selected
steps: 1. Open the Car Booking page for the selected vehicle and rental period
2. Enter required fields: Driver Full Name, Driver Age, License Number, License Issue Country, Email, and Phone Number using <valid> placeholders
3. Verify the Confirm Booking button is visible and disabled
4. Check the Accept Terms checkbox
5. Verify the Confirm Booking button becomes enabled
test_cases.expected_result: Confirm Booking button is initially disabled and then becomes enabled after the Accept Terms checkbox is checked

test_cases.test_case: Leave a required text field blank (Driver Full Name) and submit
preconditions: User is on the Car Booking page with selected vehicle, rental period, pick-up and drop-off details visible
steps: 1. Leave the Driver Full Name field blank
2. Enter <valid number> in the Driver Age field
3. Enter <valid license number> in the License Number field
4. Select <valid country> for License Issue Country
5. Enter <valid email> in the Email field
6. Enter <valid phone number> in the Phone Number field
7. Select <valid insurance plan> in the Insurance Plan dropdown
8. Check the Accept Terms checkbox
9. Click the Confirm Booking button
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Driver Full Name field indicating it is required; form does not submit; user remains on the booking page and is not taken to payment

test_cases.test_case: Enter non-numeric input in numeric field (Driver Age)
preconditions: User is on the Car Booking page with selected vehicle and rental details visible
steps: 1. Enter <non-numeric input> in the Driver Age field
2. Enter <valid full name> in the Driver Full Name field
3. Enter <valid license number> in the License Number field
4. Select <valid country> for License Issue Country
5. Enter <valid email> in the Email field
6. Enter <valid phone number> in the Phone Number field
7. Select <valid insurance plan> in the Insurance Plan dropdown
8. Check the Accept Terms checkbox
9. Click the Confirm Booking button
test_cases.expected_result: Driver Age field displays an inline validation error indicating a numeric value is required; form does not submit; booking is not created and user remains on the booking page

test_cases.test_case: Invalid email format blocks progression (Email must be valid)
preconditions: User is on the Car Booking page with selected vehicle and rental details visible
steps: 1. Enter <valid full name> in the Driver Full Name field
2. Enter <valid number> in the Driver Age field
3. Enter <valid license number> in the License Number field
4. Select <valid country> for License Issue Country
5. Enter <invalid email format> in the Email field
6. Enter <valid phone number> in the Phone Number field
7. Select <valid insurance plan> in the Insurance Plan dropdown
8. Check the Accept Terms checkbox
9. Click the Confirm Booking button
test_cases.expected_result: Email field displays an inline validation error: "must be a valid email address"; form does not submit; user is not taken to payment

test_cases.test_case: Leave required dropdown blank (Insurance Plan) and submit
preconditions: User is on the Car Booking page with selected vehicle and rental details visible
steps: 1. Leave the Insurance Plan dropdown unselected
2. Enter <valid full name> in the Driver Full Name field
3. Enter <valid number> in the Driver Age field
4. Enter <valid license number> in the License Number field
5. Select <valid country> for License Issue Country
6. Enter <valid email> in the Email field
7. Enter <valid phone number> in the Phone Number field
8. Check the Accept Terms checkbox
9. Click the Confirm Booking button
test_cases.expected_result: Insurance Plan field displays an inline validation error indicating a selection is required; form does not submit; booking does not proceed to payment

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to confirm booking without accepting terms (precondition violation)
preconditions: User is on the Car Booking page with selected vehicle and rental details visible
steps: 1. Enter <valid full name> in the Driver Full Name field
2. Enter <valid number> in the Driver Age field
3. Enter <valid license number> in the License Number field
4. Select <valid country> for License Issue Country
5. Enter <valid email> in the Email field
6. Enter <valid phone number> in the Phone Number field
7. Select <valid insurance plan> in the Insurance Plan dropdown
8. Leave the Accept Terms checkbox unchecked
9. Attempt to click the Confirm Booking button
test_cases.expected_result: Confirm Booking button remains disabled while Accept Terms is unchecked; Accept Terms checkbox displays an inline indicator that it "must be checked to enable Confirm Booking"; no navigation to payment occurs

test_cases.test_case: Check Accept Terms to enable submit, but leave all other required fields empty and submit
preconditions: User is on the Car Booking page with selected vehicle and rental details visible
steps: 1. Leave the Driver Full Name field blank
2. Leave the Driver Age field blank
3. Leave the License Number field blank
4. Leave License Issue Country unselected
5. Leave the Email field blank
6. Leave the Phone Number field blank
7. Leave the Insurance Plan dropdown unselected
8. Check the Accept Terms checkbox
9. Click the Confirm Booking button
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation errors appear on each required field (Driver Full Name, Driver Age, License Number, License Issue Country, Email, Phone Number, Insurance Plan) indicating they are required; form does not submit; user remains on the booking page and is not taken to payment

test_cases.test_case: Email field: unicode/emoji characters in address local-part triggers email validation
steps: 1. Focus the Email field
2. Enter an email address containing emoji/unicode characters in the local-part into the Email field (do not fill other fields)
3. Move focus out of the Email field (blur)
test_cases.expected_result: Email field displays an inline error reading "must be a valid email address" and progression is blocked for that invalid value (is blocked / error shown)

test_cases.test_case: Driver full name: very long free-text input (200+ / 300+ chars) retained or visibly handled
steps: 1. Focus the Driver_Full_Name field
2. Enter a very long string of 300+ characters into Driver_Full_Name
3. Move focus out of the Driver_Full_Name field (blur)
test_cases.expected_result: The field accepts the long input with no inline error shown; the entered text remains visible in the Driver_Full_Name input (succeeds)

test_cases.test_case: License number: leading and trailing whitespace behavior on blur and submit
steps: 1. Focus the License_Number field
2. Enter a license string with leading and trailing spaces into License_Number (e.g. prepended and appended whitespace around a valid license-like token)
3. Move focus out of the License_Number field (blur)
4. Fill all other required fields with syntactically valid values
5. Check Accept_Terms

Only the first (modification) completes and is applied; no concurrent cancellation is processed during the pending modification. If the system instead queues the cancellation, the UI shows an explicit queued-state indicator; silent race outcomes are not allowed

test_cases.test_case: Click Book Now on a promotion that redirects to a pre-filled search
preconditions: Offers page is open and contains a promotion that redirects to a pre-filled search
steps: 1. Click the Book Now button on a promotion that redirects to a pre-filled search
test_cases.expected_result: redirects to pre-filled search with discounted rates applied

test_cases.test_case: Open Terms and Conditions for a promotion
preconditions: Offers page is open and contains promotions with a Terms and Conditions link
steps: 1. Click the Terms and Conditions link on a promotion
test_cases.expected_result: opens terms and conditions — The Terms and Conditions content for the selected promotion is visible on the screen

test_cases.test_case: Subscribe with invalid email format is rejected
steps: 1. Navigate to the Offers page
2. In the Newsletter Subscription form, enter <invalid email format> in the Email field
3. Click the Subscribe button
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Email field: 'must be a valid email address' (as defined by the Email field constraint). The Subscribe action is blocked; no 'subscribed to newsletter' confirmation appears and no subscription is created.

test_cases.test_case: Apply Filters blocked when Travel Dates end is before start
preconditions: Offers page is loaded with default filter state
steps: 1. Navigate to the Offers page
2. In the Offers Filters form, set Travel Dates start to <start date>
3. Set Travel Dates end to <earlier date than start>
4. Click the Apply Filters button
test_cases.expected_result: Travel Dates field displays an inline error indicating the end date must be after the start date (e.g., 'End date must be after Start date'). The Apply Filters action is blocked; the offers list is not filtered/changed and the page does not perform the 'filters offers list' success action.

test_cases.test_case: No Book Now action available when promotions list is empty
preconditions: Offers page is loaded with no promotions available (Promotions_List is empty)
steps: 1. Navigate to the Offers page where there are no promotions to display
2. Inspect the Promotions list area for Book Now buttons
test_cases.expected_result: Promotions list is empty and no Book Now buttons are visible. The Apply_Promo_Code and Redirect_Pre_Filled_Search actions cannot be initiated from the UI; attempting to start booking or redirection is not possible and no booking flow or redirect occurs.

test_cases.test_case: Travel_Dates start and end set to the same day (same-day travel) should be accepted
steps: 1. Click the Offers_Filters form to open filter controls
2. In Travel_Dates, set Start = <selected date>
3. In Travel_Dates, set End = <same selected date>
4. Click Apply Filters
test_cases.expected_result: Apply Filters succeeds; Promotions_List updates to reflect filters; the Travel_Dates UI shows a date chip displaying the same-day range (Start = End) indicating the filter is applied

test_cases.test_case: Travel_Dates Start set one day after End should be blocked
steps: 1. Click the Offers_Filters form to open filter controls
2. In Travel_Dates, set Start = <date B>
3. In Travel_Dates, set End = <date A> where <date B> is exactly one day after <date A>
4. Click Apply Filters
test_cases.expected_result: Travel_Dates field displays an inline error indicating the start date is after the end date and Apply Filters is blocked (error shown); Promotions_List is not changed

test_cases.test_case: Newsletter email with leading and trailing whitespace is trimmed before submission
steps: 1. Click into the Newsletter_Subscription Email field
2. Enter an email address with leading and trailing whitespace surrounding the local and domain parts: ' <email> '
3. Click Subscribe
test_cases.expected_result: Subscription succeeds; confirmation UI is shown and the displayed subscribed email is trimmed (no leading/trailing whitespace) in the confirmation message

test_cases.test_case: Newsletter email containing Unicode characters in local part is rejected as invalid
steps: 1. Click into the Newsletter_Subscription Email field
2. Enter an email address that includes Unicode characters in the local part (non-ASCII characters)
3. Click Subscribe
test_cases.expected_result: Subscription is blocked; Email field displays an inline error with text 'must be a valid email address' (error shown) and no subscription confirmation appears

test_cases.test_case: Destination search accepts an extremely long pasted query (>200 characters) and Apply Filters executes
steps: 1. Click into the Offers_Filters Destination search field
2. Paste a very long string (>200 characters) into the Destination field
3. Click Apply Filters
test_cases.expected_result: Apply Filters succeeds; Promotions_List updates (possibly showing zero matches) and the Destination input visually handles the long value (field shows the long value or an ellipsized/truncated UI representation); no crash or navigation error occurs

test_cases.test_case: Rapid double-clicking Book Now (Apply_Promo_Code) results in a single promo application
preconditions: At least one promotion item visible in Promotions_List
steps: 1. Locate a promotion item in Promotions_List with a Book_Now button configured to Apply_Promo_Code
2. Click the Book_Now button once
3. Immediately click the Book_Now button a second time (before the first action completes)
test_cases.expected_result: Second click is ignored / blocked; Book_Now shows a loading state then becomes disabled until completion; a single promo-applied confirmation/toast is shown and only one promo application is performed (no duplicate promo application) — visible as a single toast or UI badge

test_cases.test_case: After redirect to pre-filled search from Book Now, pressing browser Back returns to Offers with filters preserved
steps: 1. In Offers_Filters set Service_Type = <value>
2. In Offers_Filters set Destination = <value>
3. In Offers_Filters set Travel_Dates Start and End = <dates>
4. Click Apply Filters
5. From Promotions_List click Book_Now that triggers Redirect_Pre_Filled_Search
6. Wait for the pre-filled search page to load
7. Press the browser Back button
test_cases.expected_result: Browser navigates back to the Offers page; the Offers_Filters fields (Service_Type, Destination, Travel_Dates) retain the values set before the redirect (filters preserved) and Promotions_List displays according to those retained filters

test_cases.test_case: Authenticated user clicks Logout and is returned to Home page
steps: 1. Click the Logout button in the action bar
test_cases.expected_result: terminates current session; clears sensitive session data; redirects to home page; subsequent attempts to access protected pages redirect to login page. The Home page is displayed after logout.

test_cases.test_case: Logged-out user attempting to open a protected page is redirected to Login page
preconditions: User session is terminated (user is logged out)
steps: 1. Attempt to navigate to <protected page> (enter protected page URL or click link to protected page)
test_cases.expected_result: The Login page is displayed; the Login form is visible, and access to the requested protected page is not granted.

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to invoke Logout action when user is not authenticated (precondition not met)
preconditions: User is not authenticated / no active session
steps: 1. Ensure the user is signed out (no active session)
2. Navigate directly to the Logout URL / click the Logout endpoint link (attempt to trigger Logout while unauthenticated)
test_cases.expected_result: Navigation is blocked: the application redirects to the Login page and displays the login form. The Logout action is not performed (no session termination occurs because there is no active session). No protected content is shown.

test_cases.test_case: Unauthenticated state shows no action buttons (Logout not visible)
preconditions: User is not authenticated / no active session
steps: 1. Ensure the user is signed out (no active session)
2. Open the application UI area that normally contains session actions (header, user menu, or action bar)
test_cases.expected_result: The action bar / user menu does not display a 'Logout' button or any authenticated-only actions. There is no clickable Logout control visible in the Unauthenticated state (no action buttons are present).

test_cases.test_case: After Logout, accessing a protected page is blocked and redirects to login
steps: 1. Sign in as <role> to create an authenticated session
2. Click the Logout action to terminate the session
3. After logout completes, navigate to a known protected page URL (direct URL entry or bookmarked link)
test_cases.expected_result: Access is blocked: the application redirects to the Login page and displays the login form. Protected page content is not displayed; the terminated session is not restored by the navigation.

test_cases.test_case: Double-click Logout rapidly (duplicate click race)
preconditions: User is logged in and a Logout button is visible in the UI
steps: 1. From the authenticated session, click the Logout button
2. Immediately (within milliseconds) click the Logout button again
test_cases.expected_result: First click succeeds: session termination runs, user is redirected to the home page. Second click is ignored (no duplicate logout or error shown). Subsequent navigation attempts to protected pages are blocked and redirect to the login page.

test_cases.test_case: Use browser Back after Logout (cached-protected-page edge)
preconditions: User is logged in and currently on a protected page or any page with Logout available
steps: 1. Click the Logout button
2. After redirect to home completes, press the browser Back button once
test_cases.expected_result: Navigation back to a previously viewed protected page is blocked: the UI does not restore an authenticated protected view and instead redirects to the login page (protected page access is blocked). No sensitive content is shown from cache.

test_cases.test_case: Logout in one tab then quickly access protected page in another tab
preconditions: User is logged in and has at least two browser tabs open in the same session
Tab A is showing an authenticated page; Tab B is ready to navigate to a protected page
steps: 1. In Tab A, click the Logout button
2. Immediately in Tab B, attempt to navigate to a protected page (click a protected page link or enter its URL)
test_cases.expected_result: Logout in Tab A succeeds: session is terminated and Tab A redirects to the home page. Access attempt in Tab B is blocked: navigation to the protected page redirects to the login page (no protected content is shown).

test_cases.test_case: Click Logout while a protected page is mid-load (in-flight request)
preconditions: User is logged in and has started loading a protected page (network request in progress)
steps: 1. While the protected page is still loading, click the Logout button
2. Observe whether the protected page finishes rendering any sensitive content
test_cases.expected_result: Logout succeeds: session termination and redirect to the home page occur. Any in-flight loading of protected content is effectively canceled or not displayed — no sensitive content from the in-flight request is shown after logout. Subsequent attempts to access protected pages are blocked and redirect to the login page.
